projectHistory.title: Local Business Digital Presence Audit
projectHistory.description: Audited 5 local Muzaffarnagar businesses, identified zero-cost growth gaps in their digital presence. Produced actionable reports for each.
projectHistory.impactStatement: One client saw 340% Instagram follower growth in 6 weeks after implementing recommendations

projectHistory.title: TruthGrid Demo Campaign
projectHistory.description: Built a complete content strategy for TruthGrid startup launch including LinkedIn posts, landing page copy, and email drip sequence.
projectHistory.impactStatement: Campaign live on LinkedIn with 2,300 impressions in first week, 87 waitlist signups

projectHistory.title: Competitor Analysis: EdTech Platforms India
projectHistory.description: Deep analysis of Unacademy, BYJU's, Internshala positioning for TruthGrid differentiation strategy.
projectHistory.impactStatement: Internal document — used to define TruthGrid's 'CIBIL for Skills' positioning
